EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user with ID {subject.account.id} executed a command to clear command history on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} executed a command to clear command history on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} deleted a file with command history on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} deleted a file with command history on host {event_src.host}
